title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a valid user can sign in and land in the authenticated area where dashboard statistics are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed
Verify the authenticated area is shown

title: Block unauthenticated access to the dashboard
description: This verifies that opening the dashboard without signing in sends the user to the auth flow instead of exposing protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the auth flow is shown
Verify dashboard content is not displayed

title: Block unauthenticated access to the students page
description: This verifies that opening the students page without signing in sends the user to the auth flow instead of exposing protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /students
Verify the auth flow is shown
Verify student list content is not displayed

title: Block unauthenticated access to the teachers page
description: This verifies that opening the teachers page without signing in sends the user to the auth flow instead of exposing protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /teachers
Verify the auth flow is shown
Verify teacher list content is not displayed

title: View dashboard statistics after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open the dashboard and see school statistics and charts.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the dashboard
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed
Verify dashboard charts are displayed

title: Access teacher management after signing in
description: An authenticated user can sign in and reach the teachers area to review teacher records.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify the teacher list is displayed

title: Open the students roster after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can navigate to the students area and review the roster.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the students page
Verify the student roster is displayed
Verify student records are listed

title: View teacher records from the teachers area
description: An authenticated user can open the teachers area directly after signing in and see the list of teacher records.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify the teacher list is displayed

title: Review the teacher list after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open the teachers area and review the list of teachers.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the teachers page
Verify the teacher list is displayed
Verify teacher records are listed

title: Create a new student record
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can create a student record from the students page and see it appear in the roster.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the students page
Start creating a new student record
Fill in the student details with valid values
Submit the new student form
Verify the new student appears in the roster
Verify the student list remains visible

title: Keep teachers area available after navigating from other school areas
description: An authenticated user can move between the main authenticated areas and still open the teachers list successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the dashboard
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify the teacher list is displayed

title: Edit an existing student record
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open an existing student record, update it, and see the updated details reflected in the students area.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the students page
Open an existing student record for editing
Update the student details with valid changes
Submit the student form
Verify the updated student details are displayed
Verify the edited student remains in the roster

title: Preserve access to teachers after visiting students
description: An authenticated user can navigate from the students area to the teachers area and review teacher records.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the students area
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify the teacher list is displayed

title: Return to the teachers area after using the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can leave the dashboard and still open the teachers list successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the dashboard
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify the teacher list is displayed

title: Show validation feedback for incomplete sign in
description: This verifies that submitting the sign in form without required information shows validation feedback and keeps the user on the auth page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Submit the login form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the auth form remains visible

title: Show an empty teachers state when no records are available
description: An authenticated user sees an empty state in the teachers area when no teacher records are available to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to the teachers area
Verify an empty state message is displayed
